theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A ticketing and approval system for Dapodik requires high clarity, functional-first hierarchy, and maximum data density without visual noise. Aligning with Linear and GitHub Issues, the design uses a monochrome structural base accented exclusively by functional status colors.

rules: Use mono fonts (JetBrains Mono) for ticket identifiers like TCK-2026-000001 to emphasize technical precision.
Labels over fields must be uppercase with tight tracking for the 'SaaS control room' look.

page_structure.nav: Sidebar nav or top navigation with sticky header, z-50, backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80, 1px border bottom.
page_structure.container: Max-width 7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8.

grid_systems.dashboard: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Dense data, completely utilizing the screen.
grid_systems.ticket_detail: Asymmetric split layout: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8. Main left column (col-span-2) for timeline/form, right column (col-span-1) for sticky metadata/SLA constraints.

cards.style: Flat, pure white bg, 1px solid border (border-zinc-200), zero shadow by default to maintain the brutalist clean look.
cards.hover: Subtle transition with shadow-sm and border color darkens slightly.

badges.style: Rounded-full (pill shape), px-2.5 py-0.5, text-xs font-medium. Always use the bg, text, and border color defined in status_colors. Includes a small colored dot next to text if space permits.

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-950 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-900 border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-50 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

timeline.style: GitHub Issue inspired. Left-aligned border line (border-l-2 border-zinc-200). Items stack vertically.
timeline.nodes: Icons wrapped in a rounded-full bg-zinc-100 border-2 border-white absolute -left-[17px].
timeline.content: Cards attached to timeline nodes must have high contrast border and subtle shadow. Differentiate system logs (no card, just text) vs user comments (enclosed in a card).

tables.style: Dense tabular layout. text-sm. border-b border-zinc-200 per row. Sticky header with text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider. No vertical borders inside the table.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use crisp, standard thickness icons. Recommended: Activity, Filter, Clock (for SLAs), FileText, CircleCheck, AlertCircle.

empty_state_image.description: Abstract clean light theme shape, perfect for dashboard empty state or 'All clear' state.
empty_state_image.usage: Use as a small placeholder visual (max-h-32) in empty table states or dashboard 'No pending tickets' areas, desaturated or layered with opacity.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup required font: geist and manrope (or generic fonts acting as them).
Ensure standard Tailwind configuration matches the color palette outlined, specifically extending zinc and status colors.
Focus on building Shadcn components over raw HTML inputs for complex interactions (Combobox for Master Data, Datepicker for SLA).
Prioritize optical alignment on the dashboard metrics (Stats cards with minimal design, large numbers).
For the Ticket Detail page, construct a robust timeline component that supports user avatars, comments, and system-generated status change events seamlessly.
Enforce responsive mobile-first views: data tables should gracefully degrade to stacked cards on small screens.
